reviews.comment: My recertification was quick and thorough. The teacher did a great job of refreshing information while not sounding like I was in a lecture. He was much more engaging and personable and it felt more like an educational conversation with a medical peer than a monotonous class which made it easier to retain the information being refreshed.

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for sharing, Meghan! It's great to know your recertification felt more like a refreshing conversation than a typical lecture. We're glad it worked for you!

Brian did a excelent job on both  explanations, hands on demostations and answering questions.

reviews.comment: 910 CPR made it easy for me to complete my AHA BLS!! I work remote and was able to complete the online portion through work but rather than drive 3 hours for my check off , CPR 910 allowed for me to send in my completion certificate and easily schedule my in-person skills check off . Brian’s communication was great, let me know quickly he had received my certificate and was attaching it to my registration . I loved that with the multiple locations I was easily able to find one near me and quickly . I walked in and was able to go right to doing my check off . So glad I was able to do that. I will definitely be back to use them in the future and will also refer others !

reviewReply.comment:

Thank you so much for your kind review! We're delighted to hear you had a positive experience! It's great to hear that process and locations were convenient. We truely appreciate your recommendation and look forward to working with you again.
